generated_oml:
instance SensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor networks on the Physical Twin collecting operational data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmitted
]

instance SensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SensorNetwork
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data collected from Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, SimulationEngine, StateEstimationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric models representing physical structures using CAD representations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, SimulationEngine, StateEstimationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical models describing dynamic behavior using differential equations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, SimulationEngine, StateEstimationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms that update model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance SimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine for predicting physical twin behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance OptimizerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimization algorithms for performance enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SupervisoryControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory controllers for automated adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithms for identifying anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimation algorithms for determining current system states"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of safety and operational optimality through sensor data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OperationalOptimalityInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulations to forecast physical twin behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedBehaviorInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization for performance enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control via supervisory controllers for automated adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomatedAdjustmentAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection to identify anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation to determine current system states based on sensor inputs"
    DTDFVocab:provides CurrentStateEstimationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight generated from fault detection algorithms identifying anomalies"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight generated from state estimation algorithms determining current system states"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight generated from optimization algorithms for performance enhancement"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating system safety violation detected by monitors"
]

instance OperationalOptimalityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating operational optimality status"
]

instance PredictedBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from predictive simulations forecasting physical twin behavior"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from optimization algorithms for performance enhancement"
]

instance CurrentStateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from state estimation determining current system states"
]

instance AutomatedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment to physical twin via supervisory controllers"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system orchestrates calibration algorithms to update physical and cyber models with parameter estimates from sensor data, which inform monitoring systems that assess safety and optimality; detected violations trigger human or algorithmic interventions to adjust the Physical Twin."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained through calibration algorithms that adjust parameters using sensor data to ensure accurate representation of the Physical Twin's current state. Validation is performed via continuous monitoring systems that detect safety and performance violations, triggering corrective actions by humans or automated algorithms to maintain system integrity."
]
